pi_items.metadata_value: NCBI human insulin gene (NM_000207.3 or J00265.1)

pi_items.source: Standard BLS SOC category 19-1042 matches task description.
Standard BLS SOC group 19-0000 matches task domain.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real human insulin gene transcript downloaded directly from NCBI Nucleotide (Accession NM_000207.3). The sequence has an exact length of 465 bp, containing exactly 15 CpG dinucleotides and a GC content of approximately 63.87% (A=91, T=77, G=141, C=156). The ground truth for the verification script is dynamically calculated from this precise 465-bp sequence during task setup.
